Notice Of Hearing (Notices) *Remote Appearance*
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Kimberly Pomerantz, Esq., G&B LAW, LLP, 818) 382-6200, for Petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC,
Te'Jon Moody, Payee
No other appearances

Hearing is held. Not argued. The Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing (Notices) *Remote Appearance*
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Aug-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GLEN NAVIS, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner J.G. Wenworth Originations, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS.

The Court indicates it is now in receipt from petitioner of the requisite set of courtesy copies of petitioner's moving papers.

The Court continues the hearing on this matter to August 3, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

The Court indicates the payee should appear at the August 3rd hearing (and may appear remotely).

Petitioner is to provide notice of the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
